delete_confirm: Delete this project? This cannot be undone.
export_quality_warning: High resolution needs more time and storage
help_create_video_1: 1. Choose the right video ratio from the home screen (story, landscape, or square)
help_create_video_2: 2. Tap the "Merge" tool to add your first video or image
help_create_video_3: 3. Use the tools at the bottom (text, filters, audio, stickers...) to customize your work
help_create_video_4: 4. You can reorder clips by dragging on the timeline
help_create_video_5: 5. Your work auto-saves every 10 seconds as a draft, accessible from the home screen
help_export_video_1: 1. Tap the "Export" button at the top of the editor screen
help_export_video_2: 2. Choose the right resolution (higher resolution takes longer)
help_export_video_3: 3. Choose the frame rate (30 works for most cases)
help_export_video_4: 4. Tap "Start Export" and wait until the bar reaches 100%
help_export_video_5: 5. The final video is automatically saved to your device storage
remove_watermark_desc: A watermark is enabled by default on every exported video. Turn this on to remove it permanently
share_app_message: Check out this video editor! A great app for editing videos easily 🎬
no_face_detected: No face detected, try adjusting camera angle
camera_permission_needed: Camera permission is needed to use this feature
face_filter_disclaimer: Experimental code-drawn filters - work best with good lighting and a face directly facing the camera
